code:
import io
import string
import list

let input = io.read_to_end()
let n = string.len(input)
mut nums: List<Int> = []
mut cur = 0
mut sign = 1
mut has = false
mut i = 0
while i < n
  match string.byte_at(input, i)
  when Some(c)
    if c == 32 or c == 9 or c == 10 or c == 13
      if has
        nums = list.push(nums, cur * sign)
        cur = 0
        sign = 1
        has = false
      end
    else if c == 45
      sign = 0 - 1
    else if c == 43
      sign = 1
    else
      cur = cur * 10 + (c - 48)
      has = true
    end
  when None
    ()
  end
  i = i + 1
end
if has
  nums = list.push(nums, cur * sign)
end

mut sums: List<Int> = []
mut acc = 0
for x in nums
  acc = acc + x
  sums = list.push(sums, acc)
end

mut out = ""
mut first = true
for y in sums
  if first
    out = "#{y}"
    first = false
  else
    out = "#{out} #{y}"
  end
end
println(out)
